[PUBLISHED DATE]: 2018-07-11
[TITLE]: Iran: Young man flogged 80 times for drinking alcohol as a child - Amnesty International
[METADATA/INTRO]: The public flogging on Tuesday in Iran of a young man convicted of consuming alcohol when he was just 14 or 15 years old over a decade ago highlights the inhumanity of a justice system that legalizes brutality, said Amnesty...
[BEST EVIDENCE CHUNK]: “The Iranian authorities’ prolific use of corporal punishment, including on children, demonstrates a shocking disregard for basic humanity. They should immediately abolish all forms of such punishment, which in Iran includes amputation and blinding as well as flogging.” 
 The public flogging took place on 10 July in Niazmand Square, Kashmar, Razavi Khorasan province, where the man, known just as M. R., was flogged 80 times on his back. Domestic media outlets have posted a picture from showing the young man tied to a tree as he was flogged by a masked man, with a crowd of people watching at a distance.

[PUBLISHED DATE]: Unknown Date
[TITLE]: Iran: young man tied to a tree and publicly flogged 80 times for drinking alcohol | Amnesty International UK
[METADATA/INTRO]: Iran: young man tied to a tree and publicly flogged 80 times for drinking alcohol The flogging was photographed and reported in local Iranian media © Amnesty International...
[BEST EVIDENCE CHUNK]: The punishment was carried out yesterday, when the man - identified only as “M.R.” - was flogged 80 times in Niazmand Square in the city of Kashmar, in Iran’s north-eastern Razavi Khorasan province. 
 Local media outlets have posted a photograph showing the young man tied to a tree as he was flogged on his back by a masked man, with a crowd of people watching at a distance. 
 According to Kashmar’s public prosecutor, M. R. had consumed alcohol during a wedding more than a decade ago where an argument caused a fight that resulted in the death of a 17-year-old. The public prosecutor has conceded that M.R. was not involved in the murder and that the flogging sentence was for drinking alcohol.

[TITLE]: Man tied to tree and flogged 80 times in Iran decade after drinking alcohol at wedding when 14 | Daily Mail Online
[METADATA/INTRO]: Man is tied to tree and flogged EIGHTY times in Iran – a decade after drinking alcohol at a wedding when he was 14 years old - WARNING: DISTRESSING CONTENT...
[BEST EVIDENCE CHUNK]: Man is tied to tree and flogged EIGHTY times in Iran – a decade after drinking alcohol at a wedding when he was 14 years old 
 - WARNING: DISTRESSING CONTENT 
 - Public prosecutor said the man had drunk alcohol, and should be flogged 
 - A crowd watched his punishment from a distance in the city of Kashmar 
 - Amnesty International slammed it as 'horrific example of warped priorities' 
 A man in Iran has been publicly flogged 80 times, a decade after being convicted of consuming alcohol at a wedding when he was about 14 years old. 
 Amnesty International has condemned the punishment as 'horrific', after local media outlets posted a photograph showing the young man tied to a tree as he was flogged on his back by a masked man, while a crowd watched on from a distance.
